rationale: The cited paper is a methodological tutorial on probing interactions in moderated regression (spotlight/floodlight simple-effects tests), and the citing paper reports multiple moderated designs (e.g., norm deviation × self-construal and 2×2×2 interactions) where such procedures are directly relevant. Even though the matched evidence is only a reference-list DOI entry, this looks plausibly like a methods source rather than an incidental background mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
